symptom: repeated fractures from minor knocks since early childhood with bowed limbs
hook: the bones were paper-thin and bowed and marked with healed fractures at every turn
whatYouSee: Thin under-mineralised bowed bones with multiple fractures at different stages of healing.
whyItMatters: It is an inherited collagen disorder that causes fragile bones, blue sclerae, and hearing loss with fractures from minimal trauma.
treatment: Management includes bisphosphonates to strengthen bone, fracture care, surgical rodding of long bones, and physiotherapy.
takeaway: Thin bowed bones with many old fractures point to osteogenesis imperfecta. This is brittle bone disease.

condition.keyFindings: diffusely thin, osteopenic, gracile bones with multiple fractures at different healing stages, bowing deformities and thin cortices

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with repeated fractures from minor knocks since early childhood with bowed limbs.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And the bones were paper-thin and bowed and marked with healed fractures at every turn.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Osteogenesis imperfecta

👀 What you see:
Thin under-mineralised bowed bones with multiple fractures at different stages of healing.

🦴 Why it matters:
It is an inherited collagen disorder that causes fragile bones, blue sclerae, and hearing loss with fractures from minimal trauma.

📝 Takeaway:
Thin bowed bones with many old fractures point to osteogenesis imperfecta. This is brittle bone disease.
